$roomId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['name','codeHash','maxUsers','createdBy','createdAt']) && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length > 0 && newData.child('name').val().length <= 40 && newData.child('codeHash').isString() && newData.child('codeHash').val().matches('^[a-f0-9]{64}$') && newData.child('maxUsers').isNumber() && newData.child('maxUsers').val() >= 2 && newData.child('maxUsers').val() <= 20 && newData.child('createdBy').isString() && newData.child('createdBy').val().length > 0 && newData.child('createdBy').val().length <= 24 && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber()

$msgId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['type','ts']) && newData.child('type').isString() && newData.child('ts').isNumber() && newData.child('ts').val() > 1700000000000 && newData.child('ts').val() < now + 120000 && (newData.child('type').val() === 'text' ? newData.hasChildren(['sender','text']) && (newData.getChildrenCount() === 4 || newData.getChildrenCount() === 5) && newData.child('sender').isString() && newData.child('sender').val().length > 0 && newData.child('sender').val().length <= 24 && newData.child('text').isString() && newData.child('text').val().length > 0 && newData.child('text').val().length <= 1800 && (!newData.child('replyTo').exists() || (newData.child('replyTo').hasChildren(['id','sender','textPreview']) && newData.child('replyTo').getChildrenCount() === 3 && newData.child('replyTo/id').isString() && newData.child('replyTo/id').val().length <= 120 && newData.child('replyTo/sender').isString() && newData.child('replyTo/sender').val().length <= 40 && newData.child('replyTo/textPreview').isString() && newData.child('replyTo/textPreview').val().length <= 120)) : newData.child('type').val() === 'image' ? newData.hasChildren(['sender','imageUrl','imageMeta']) && (newData.getChildrenCount() === 5 || newData.getChildrenCount() === 6) && newData.child('sender').isString() && newData.child('sender').val().length > 0 && newData.child('sender').val().length <= 24 && newData.child('imageUrl').isString() && newData.child('imageUrl').val().matches('^https://') && newData.child('imageMeta').hasChildren(['w','h','size','mime']) && newData.child('imageMeta').getChildrenCount() === 4 && newData.child('imageMeta/w').isNumber() && newData.child('imageMeta/h').isNumber() && newData.child('imageMeta/size').isNumber() && newData.child('imageMeta/size').val() <= 1400000 && newData.child('imageMeta/mime').isString() && (!newData.child('replyTo').exists() || (newData.child('replyTo').hasChildren(['id','sender','textPreview']) && newData.child('replyTo').getChildrenCount() === 3 && newData.child('replyTo/id').isString() && newData.child('replyTo/id').val().length <= 120 && newData.child('replyTo/sender').isString() && newData.child('replyTo/sender').val().length <= 40 && newData.child('replyTo/textPreview').isString() && newData.child('replyTo/textPreview').val().length <= 120)) : newData.child('type').val() === 'sticker' ? newData.hasChildren(['sender','stickerUrl','stickerMeta']) && (newData.getChildrenCount() === 5 || newData.getChildrenCount() === 6) && newData.child('sender').isString() && newData.child('sender').val().length > 0 && newData.child('sender').val().length <= 24 && newData.child('stickerUrl').isString() && newData.child('stickerUrl').val().matches('^https://') && newData.child('stickerMeta').hasChildren(['w','h','size','mime']) && newData.child('stickerMeta/w').isNumber() && newData.child('stickerMeta/h').isNumber() && newData.child('stickerMeta/w').val() <= 1024 && newData.child('stickerMeta/h').val() <= 1024 && newData.child('stickerMeta/size').isNumber() && newData.child('stickerMeta/size').val() <= 680000 && newData.child('stickerMeta/mime').isString() && (!newData.child('replyTo').exists() || (newData.child('replyTo').hasChildren(['id','sender','textPreview']) && newData.child('replyTo').getChildrenCount() === 3 && newData.child('replyTo/id').isString() && newData.child('replyTo/id').val().length <= 120 && newData.child('replyTo/sender').isString() && newData.child('replyTo/sender').val().length <= 40 && newData.child('replyTo/textPreview').isString() && newData.child('replyTo/textPreview').val().length <= 120)) : newData.child('type').val() === 'sys' ? newData.hasChildren(['text']) && newData.getChildrenCount() === 3 && newData.child('text').isString() && newData.child('text').val().length > 0 && newData.child('text').val().length <= 120 : false)
